title: Clearly | 100M x 1.2 M Banquet Roll. Disposable Paper Tablecloth for Weddings, Buffets & Dinner. Large 100M long Disposable Tablecover Protector - Plain White
features: PROTECTS TABLES IN STYLE - with a sophisticated and elegant design, this convenient white cloth is perfect for draping over large tables and protecting them from spills, stains and damage during black-tie events and casual gatherings

COVERS LARGE AREA - at a generous 100m length, the paper table cloth ensures a seamless look even for long banquet tables so there's no gaps or need for multiple paper table cloths - it's also easy to trim to fit tables of different sizes and shapes

QUICK AND EASY TO USE - simply roll out the white table cover onto your table to instantly transform the room and when your event is over just roll it all up and dispose of it to conveniently clean up all spills and stains in one go

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL - made from durable, premium material that withstands rigor use at any event, plus the food-grade paper is safe to use for food contact so you can confidently serve a variety of dishes, desserts and drinks without contamination
SUITABLE FOR INDOOR AND OUTDOOR EVENTS - this white paper table cloth is perfect for weddings, birthday parties, anniversaries, baby showers, christenings, corporate functions and more
